usecase.name: [Sample App] Submit Contact Form
usecase.description: Fill out and submit the contact form successfully

steps.instruction: Navigate to the Contact page using the navigation bar
Verify the contact form is visible with heading 'Contact Us'
Type 'Jane Doe' into the Full Name field
Type 'I would like to learn more about your Enterprise plan and pricing options for our team.' into the Message field
Check the 'Subscribe to our newsletter' checkbox
Verify a green success toast appears with text 'Message sent successfully'
Verify the form fields are reset to empty
